signals.headline: Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Alpenglow consensus upgrade, which aims to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds, has passed governance voting with overwhelming support[1][5]. This major technical milestone represents a confirmed protocol enhancement that strengthens Solana's competitive positioning.

signals.headline: SOL Trading Near $82-$83 with Analyst Targets of $88-$100 by Month-End | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
SOL Trading Near $82-$83 with Analyst Targets of $88-$100 by Month-End | YES | MED confidence**

SOL is trading in the $82-$83 range with analysts projecting targets of $88 to $100 by the end of April if breakout conditions confirm[4]. However, the token remains compressed at critical support levels despite strong fundamentals[4].

signals.raw:
Drift Protocol $280 Million Hack (April 1) | YES | HIGH confidence**

A major security incident occurred on the Solana ecosystem when DeFi platform Drift Protocol was hacked for at least $280 million[6]. While this affected a single protocol rather than Solana's core network, it represents significant negative news for ecosystem confidence.

signals.headline: Solana Hits 167 Million Monthly Token Holders - All-Time Record | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167 Million Monthly Token Holders - All-Time Record | YES | HIGH confidence**

Solana's network has achieved an all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders with daily non-vote transactions reaching 148 million[1]. This represents significant network growth that could influence bullish sentiment in prediction markets.
